Meaning.Vi: miễn phí (được cung cấp mà không phải trả tiền)
Meaning.En: Provided free of charge, especially as a courtesy or favor.
Meaning.Example: The hotel offered complimentary breakfast to all guests.

Situation.Vi: Khách sạn cung cấp bữa sáng miễn phí cho khách lưu trú.
Situation.En: A hotel provides breakfast at no extra cost to its guests.

Meaning.Vi: khen ngợi, ca ngợi (thường là quá mức)
Meaning.En: Expressing praise or admiration, sometimes excessively or insincerely.
Meaning.Example: The reviewer’s review was full of complimentary remarks about the actor’s performance.

Situation.Vi: Bài đánh giá đầy lời khen ngợi về diễn xuất của diễn viên.
Situation.En: A review containing many positive, admiring comments about someone’s work.
